description.value:
Frequency once per hour

Effect s You transform yourself and your held and worn equipment to disguise yourself as a specific disguise chosen as one of your favored disguises for the Favored Disguise skill feat. Unlike with Impersonate, you don't have to attempt a Deception check to interact with someone to conceal your identity, and the check happens only if someone else specifically uses a [[/act seek]] action to attempt a Perception check against your Deception or Performance DC (whichever is higher).

Special You can only take this feat at 1st level, and you can't retrain out of this feat or into this feat.
